qualityRules: Must not invent claims when the knowledge base is empty.
Must include synthesized findings rather than raw source chunks.
Overview and key findings must be complete sentences.
Must mention sample size, dp1, cov1, significance, and effect size when available.
Must include non-empty sourceReferences backed by knowledge-base sections.
Must avoid repeated-token wording and transliteration artifacts.
Each keyFinding must include claim and sourceSection.
Each keyFinding should represent one distinct finding.
Key findings must avoid multi-metric bundled claims.
May include confidenceNote when confidence interval evidence is available.
